ctf-quick-scan.template:
对指定题目执行快速扫描。若提供参数 $ARGUMENTS，则将其视为题目目录名，路径为 ./workspace/active/$ARGUMENTS 。依次运行：
python3 scripts/core/crypto_quick_scan.py --project ./workspace/active/$ARGUMENTS
python3 scripts/core/misc_quick_scan.py --project ./workspace/active/$ARGUMENTS
输出扫描摘要与下一步建议。若未提供参数，先询问题目目录名。

ctf-web-probe.template:
执行 Web 快速探测。若参数 $ARGUMENTS 以 http(s):// 开头，则运行：
python3 scripts/core/web_quick_probe.py --url $ARGUMENTS
否则将其视为题目目录名并运行：
python3 scripts/core/web_quick_probe.py --project ./workspace/active/$ARGUMENTS
输出探测摘要与下一步建议。若未提供参数，先询问 URL 或题目目录名。

ctf-preflight.template:
对当前公开仓库执行预检。若提供参数 $ARGUMENTS，则运行：
./scripts/ops/ctf_preflight.sh --event-dir $ARGUMENTS
否则运行：
./scripts/ops/ctf_preflight.sh --require-auth 0 --check-mcp 0
输出预检摘要与需要修复的项目。

ctf.description: CTF orchestrator: classify problem, delegate to specialist agents, verify and report flag with steps

ctf-web.description: Web: identify stack/vuln, reproduce, script, and extract flag

ctf-pwn.description: Pwn: triage, find bug, craft exploit, get flag

ctf-crypto.description: Crypto: identify scheme, model, solve, recover flag

ctf-rev.description: Rev: analyze binary, recover logic, extract flag

ctf-misc.description: Misc: file forensics, stego, encoding, protocols

ctf-forensics.description: Forensics: analyze disk/memory/pcap/media artifacts and recover flag

ctf-osint.description: OSINT: identify people/places/objects with public sources and evidence

ctf-malware.description: Malware: recover behavior, config, and embedded secrets from suspicious samples
